global_description: A lighting device with a base, a slender stand, and a bulb covered by a shade. Typically made of metal or plastic, with a fabric or glass shade. Common colors include white, black, or metallic finishes.

part_details.base: Sturdy, often circular or square, providing stability
part_details.stand: Slender, vertical, connecting base to shade
part_details.shade: Cylindrical or conical, made of fabric or glass
part_details.bulb: Enclosed within the shade, providing light
part_details.switch: Located on stand or base for operation

spatial_relations: Stand extends from base to shade
Switch located on stand or base
